name: Accra
tagline: West Africa's Friendliest City with Beaches, Culture, and Growing Modernity
description: Accra is one of Africa's most welcoming cities for expats, with English as the official language, a stable democracy, and a warm, open culture that makes newcomers feel at home quickly. The city offers Atlantic Ocean beaches, a vibrant nightlife and music scene rooted in highlife and afrobeats, and a rapidly modernizing infrastructure. For FIRE retirees, Accra delivers strong value with affordable housing, excellent tropical fruit and seafood, and a growing community of international residents. Ghana's Year of Return initiative has made the country especially popular with African American retirees.

quickFacts.visa: Visa required for US citizens; available on arrival or online; long-term residence permits available
quickFacts.safetyRating: Good – one of the safest countries in West Africa
quickFacts.climate: Tropical savanna with hot temperatures year-round and a rainy season
quickFacts.englishFriendly: Moderate – English is official but local languages dominate daily life

housing.description: Modern 2BR apartment in East Legon, Osu, or Airport Residential with security

dining.description: Regular dining at chop bars and local restaurants; jollof rice, banku, and grilled tilapia daily

healthcare.description: Private health insurance with access to Nyaho Medical Centre and other private clinics

transportation.description: Uber and Bolt daily; much easier than owning a car in Accra traffic

entertainment.description: Labadi Beach, live highlife and afrobeats shows, Art Centre markets, Aburi Botanical Gardens

1M.lifestyle: A modern 2-bedroom apartment with security in East Legon or Osu. Getting around by Uber and Bolt, eating jollof rice and grilled tilapia at local restaurants most days. Private health insurance covering Nyaho Medical Centre and private clinics. Labadi Beach on weekends and live music in the evenings. Power outages (dumsor) are a real nuisance, but an inverter helps. Comfortable and affordable, with a modest buffer each month.

housing.description: Spacious 3BR house in Cantonments, East Legon, or Trasacco Valley with garden and security

dining.description: Regular dining at Accra's best restaurants like Buka, Santoku, and The Republic; beach bars

healthcare.description: Comprehensive private insurance with dental, specialist, and international evacuation coverage

transportation.description: Reliable SUV with insurance for both city driving and road trips along the coast

entertainment.description: Beach club memberships, weekend trips to Cape Coast and Elmina, Ada Foah, Volta Region, gym, live music

2M.lifestyle: A spacious 3-bedroom house in Cantonments or East Legon with a garden and security. An SUV for both city driving and coastal road trips, dining at good restaurants like Buka and The Republic several times a week. Comprehensive private health insurance with evacuation coverage. Weekend trips to Cape Coast, Elmina, and Ada Foah. A cleaner a few times a week. Comfortable and well above average for Accra, with a solid monthly cushion.

housing.description: Luxury 4BR villa in Trasacco Valley, Airport Hills, or a beachfront property in La

dining.description: Fine dining at top Accra restaurants, private dinner parties, imported wine and spirits

healthcare.description: Premium private insurance with international coverage and medical evacuation

transportation.description: Late-model SUV, full insurance, private driver for daily errands

entertainment.description: Exclusive club memberships, premium beach clubs, luxury coastal retreats, art collecting, Chale Wote festival VIP

3M.lifestyle: A large villa in Trasacco Valley or Airport Hills with a driver, a cleaner, and a cook several times a week. A late-model SUV, regular dining at Accra's best restaurants, and premium health insurance with international coverage. Beach club memberships and trips along the coast. This budget goes very far in Accra, with significant margin each month for travel or savings.

housing.description: Grand estate in Trasacco Valley or exclusive beachfront compound with pool and gardens

dining.description: Personal chef, exclusive dining experiences, catered events at home

healthcare.description: Top-tier international private insurance with global coverage and concierge service

transportation.description: Luxury SUV, full-time driver, domestic flights to Kumasi and Tamale

entertainment.description: Exclusive memberships, art patronage, Afrobeats concerts, international travel, beach events

domesticHelp.description: Full household staff: housekeeper, chef, gardener, security team, driver, personal assistant

luxuryExtras.description: First-class international travel, real estate investments, major philanthropy, cultural sponsorship

5M.lifestyle: A large property in Trasacco Valley or a beachfront house with pool and gardens. A housekeeper, cook, gardener, and driver. A luxury SUV, business class flights for international travel, and top-tier health insurance with global coverage. Regular dining at the best restaurants and club memberships. Accra's moderate costs leave a large margin at this budget. Ghana's stability and welcoming culture make it a strong base for long-term living.

housing.description: Trophy estate in Trasacco Valley or private beachfront compound with guest houses

dining.description: Personal chef team, exclusive private dining, catered diplomatic-level events

healthcare.description: Top-tier international concierge medicine, executive wellness, global medical evacuation

transportation.description: Multiple luxury vehicles, full-time driver team, private charter flights

entertainment.description: Major cultural patronage, international art collecting, global philanthropy, event hosting

domesticHelp.description: Full estate staff: multiple housekeepers, chef team, security detail, drivers, personal assistant, property manager

luxuryExtras.description: Real estate portfolio, first-class global travel, major educational and community philanthropy, business investments

10M.lifestyle: A premium property in Trasacco Valley or a large beachfront house with full household staff including a housekeeper, cook, security, and drivers. Multiple vehicles, first class international flights, and top-tier global health coverage. Regular fine dining and entertaining. Accra's costs are far below what this budget provides, so the vast majority goes unspent each month. Most people at this level travel extensively and invest in local community or business projects.
